title: Why I Am Doing This
excerpt: The origin story of Project-AI — and why a sovereign, constitutional, executed-governance AGI ecosystem is not a luxury but a precondition for survival.

title: Two Species, Aligned
excerpt: Alignment is not a control problem. It is a relationship problem between two species that must learn to coexist under shared constitutional law.

title: The Flat Gap: Temporal Dissonance Between Humans and AI
excerpt: Large language models do not experience the passage of time. When a human carries elapsed grief into a conversation and the system responds as if nothing has changed, that is structural gaslighting — and it must be fixed at the architectural layer.

title: The Iron Path Executor
excerpt: Formal technical specification for deterministic AI governance: every action passes a hard-rail executor with verifiable invariants — or it does not pass at all.
